redGuard.focusedCommand: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/chatbridge/single-app-discovery.test.ts src/renderer/packages/chatbridge/single-app-tools.test.ts test/integration/chatbridge/scenarios/live-reviewed-app-invocation.test.ts
failureSummary: Natural Chess prompts with raw FEN or opening-analysis phrasing still resolved as ambiguous instead of routing into Chess.
The reviewed single-app helper still exposed Chess as the only executable reviewed tool and returned chat-only for explicit Drawing Kit prompts.
The live streamText path mounted no reviewed Drawing Kit tool, so an explicit non-Chess flagship prompt could not produce a reviewed app launch part.

greenGuard.focusedCommand: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm exec vitest run src/shared/chatbridge/single-app-discovery.test.ts src/renderer/packages/chatbridge/single-app-tools.test.ts test/integration/chatbridge/scenarios/live-reviewed-app-invocation.test.ts
